visual_cues.description: Puck carrier on right wing at top of circle, skating toward net with head up
Second attacker driving middle lane with stick on ice, trailing carrier by ~10 feet
One backchecker from inside, not yet in passing lane
Goalie at top of crease, slightly puck-side, on feet and square to carrier
Carrier stick curve on left side of blade — inferred LHD

scan_checklist.puck_carrier: Right wing, attacking with speed; shot and pass both live
scan_checklist.primary_pass_option: Middle lane attacker open for cross-crease if goalie commits
scan_checklist.weak_side_threat: Minimal; play is carrier or middle drive
scan_checklist.defenders: Single backchecker late; cannot eliminate pass alone
scan_checklist.goalie_depth_angle: Top of crease, puck-side bias; adequate angle but vulnerable to pass if over-commits

primary_read.play: Hold depth at top of crease, delay commitment, stay on feet, square to carrier while keeping middle drive in peripheral vision
primary_read.why_now: 2-on-1 with open cross-crease option; backchecker is late; challenging carrier opens pass across
primary_read.primary_risk: Diving at carrier or over-scooting puck-side leaves middle lane one-timer or tap-in

outcome_paths.label: Hold depth, delay on carrier
trigger_cues: Middle lane drive with stick ready
Carrier has not committed to shot
outcome_paths.execution: Stay at top of crease, match carrier glide, hands ready, eyes on stick; push only when shot or pass is released
outcome_paths.why_right: Forces carrier to decide; protects cross-crease; backchecker may recover
outcome_paths.why_wrong: Elite shot from circle can beat you if you give too much space and read shot late
outcome_paths.flip_condition: If middle drive is covered and carrier's hands commit to shot only, controlled challenge becomes primary

outcome_paths.label: Aggressive challenge on carrier
trigger_cues: Carrier at circle with no pass lane visible in frame
Goalie already at top of crease
outcome_paths.execution: Skate out to cut angle, take away five-hole and short side on shot
outcome_paths.why_right: Cuts shot angle and pressures poor-angle release if pass is not an option
outcome_paths.why_wrong: Middle lane is open; cross-crease pass beats you before you recover
outcome_paths.flip_condition: If middle attacker is even with defender or carrier looks pass-only, stay with delay

outcome_paths.label: Play pass first — cheat to middle
trigger_cues: Carrier's eyes and body angled toward middle
outcome_paths.execution: Shift weight toward middle, be ready for lateral push on pass
outcome_paths.why_right: Eliminates most dangerous finish if pass is predetermined
outcome_paths.why_wrong: If carrier shoots, you give up angle and short side on LHD release from right circle
outcome_paths.flip_condition: If carrier's hands load for shot and eyes stay on net, return to delay and square

outcome_paths.label: Drop early to butterfly on approach
trigger_cues: Some goalies default to down early on rushes
outcome_paths.execution: Go down before release to cover five-hole
outcome_paths.why_right: Covers low shot if release is immediate
outcome_paths.why_wrong: Removes ability to move on pass; cross-crease and deke high beat static goalie
outcome_paths.flip_condition: Only if carrier has no pass option and is in tight with shot imminent

handedness_and_screens.off_wing_on_wing_notes: LHD on right wing is off-wing; one-timer less natural but wrist shot far side and pass to middle remain live
handedness_and_screens.adjustments: Respect LHD release from right circle to far side if you over-commit; glove must stay disciplined on delay

must_happen.claim: Pass lane to middle drive must stay open for cross-crease to beat delay
must_happen.cue_basis: Middle attacker stick on ice, no defender in lane

doesnt_need_to_happen.why_ruled_out: Puck on right wing at circle; no play below goal line in frame

relationship_map.note: Open middle lane with stick down
Pass beats you before backchecker arrives if you commit early

bayesian_branches.label: Cross-crease pass
bayesian_branches.sensitivity: If middle drive were covered, posterior drops to medium

bayesian_branches.label: Shot from circle
evidence_against: Pass lane open favors pass when goalie must respect middle
bayesian_branches.sensitivity: If carrier's hands commit to shot only, posterior rises to high

moneypuck_attribution: Branch rates are league priors from MoneyPuck.com shot data (odd_man_rush_5v5 bucket). Posteriors updated for this frame's cues.

would_change_read: If middle drive is actually covered by a defender not visible in frame
If carrier is confirmed RHD, short-side shot threat increases on challenge
